1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and geometry bbox

2.description: select stormflo 200-year polygons (will be reduced by municipality bbox)

3.description: reduce stormflo polygons to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

4.description: select buildings in Kristiansand by kommunenummer

5.description: find buildings that intersect reduced stormflo polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per building (distinct bygningid)

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["bygningid"]
-- metric_column: "objid"
-- metric_as: "min_objid"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- source_step: 6
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"
